info.title: Client API
info.description:
Locale could be change by using the _locale query param. 
For example: GET /rest/applications/config/57?version=1.0.0&_locale=ru

get.summary: Find account balance by account loginSid.

put.description:
If for some reason the account exists but is not linked to a client profile
you can link it using the below method.
Some account does not support change password

get.summary: Get application config by id. Config contains send data fields description for document.
get.description: For file type always send array of objects.

put.description: Before approve application check if additional data needed using "GET applications/{id}/approve-form" method

get.description: Before decline application check if additional data needed using "GET applications/{id}/decline-form" method
Returns list of notification email layouts

get.summary: Get list of available user statuses.
Get list of available user secondary statuses.
Get document config by id. Config contains send data fields description for document.
get.description: For file type always send array of objects.

post.summary: Check handshake. Returns true if handshake is successful.

get.summary: Get psp details config by id. Config contains send data fields description for document.
get.description: For file type always send array of objects.

get.summary: Ping pong api. Return app datetime.

post.description: Transaction status depends on "CRM 2-Step Approval" field in transaction type, by default: "approved".

patch.description: Pending check or pending transaction could be declined

post.summary: Add a row to user email log.

200.description: Returns user id. User id can be used for direct login.

post.summary: Send welcome email with new user password.
Delete leads and set disabled for clients.
Accept company document. Returns user accepted company document data.

post.description: Returns user accepted company documents data

delete.summary: Delete lead and set disabled for client.

post.summary: Change commpeak status. Returns user data.
Client direct login. Returns direct login url.
Check client credentials. Returns user id. User id can be used for direct login.
Set new password for client. Returns user id. User id can be used for direct login.

ErrorResponseModel.description: Response format according to the API Problem spec (RFC 7807).

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

propertyPath.description: The property path of the violation.

notifyDisable.description: If true do not notify user

password.title: If empty password will be generated automatically.

config.title: Description of data fields for document.

Status.title:
0 if the request was successful,
Negative integer if internal server/network error occurs,
Positive integer if application/logical error occurs.

Description.title: Accurate description of the result.
Description.description: Return the actual error for any exception as it helps to diagnose issues in production.

userFtd.title: null for no filter.
userFtd.description: Transaction list by first time deposit

userFtd.title: null for no filter.
userFtd.description: Transaction list by first time deposit

amount.title: Deposit amount. The amount should be entered positive.

mt4Comment.title: Leave empty for auto comment to be used.

comment.title: Internal comment. Use it to describe the transaction for internal use.

amount.title: Amount. The amount should be entered positive but will be deducted from the balance.

skipNegativeBalanceCheck.title: Process the transaction even if the balance will become negative.

mt4Comment.title: Leave empty for auto comment to be used.

comment.title: Internal comment. Use it to describe the transaction for internal use.

currentApprovalAttempts.title: Current approval attempts to prevent race conditions.
currentApprovalAttempts.description:
Send "approvalAttempts" from the transaction data.
If the value differs from the value in the database, the operation will not be performed.

skipNegativeBalanceCheck.title: Process the transaction even if the balance will become negative.

amount.title:
Amount. Depends on transaction type sign:
positive - the amount should be entered positive and will be added to the balance
negative - the amount should be entered positive but will be deducted from the balance
any - the amount can be entered positive or negative and will affect the balance accordingly.

mt4Comment.title: Leave empty for auto comment to be used.

comment.title: Internal comment. Use it to describe the transaction for internal use.

countries.title: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 Code, the list of countries is available at /rest/dict/countries.

country.title: ISO ALPHA-2 Code, available countries depends on api user settings.

lead.title: Lead will be created, if value is "true". Client will be created, if value is "false".

acceptedDocuments.title: If value is "true" client will not be asked to accept registration documents on first login.

partnerId.title: If api user has partner id this parameter will be ignore.

sendWelcomeEmail.title: Send email with password. Email will not be sent, if it is a lead.

birthDate.title: Optional birth date in dd-mm-YYYY format.

utmParams.title: Utm params as a query string.

partnerId.title: If api user has partner id this parameter will be ignored.

country.title: ISO ALPHA-2 Code, available countries depends on api user settings.

birthDate.title: Optional birth date in dd-mm-YYYY format.

utmParams.title: Utm params as a query string.

sendWelcomeEmail.title: Send email with password. If parameter not passed, welcome email will be sent.

redirectUrl.title: Redirect to this url after login.
redirectUrl.description: Both http:// and https:// are valid but also relative URLs that contain no protocol (e.g. '//accounts/new').

logoutUrl.title: Redirect to this url after logout.
logoutUrl.description: Both http:// and https:// are valid but also relative URLs that contain no protocol (e.g. 'https://google.com').

url.description: When you redirect client to this url, client will be logged in automatically logged in. Url expires in 10 minutes.

id.description: User id or 0 if user+password not found.

question.example: What is your estimated investment amount
